_publications._publicationTitle: Drug Responses in Plexiform Neurofibroma Type I (PNF1) Cell Lines Using High-Throughput Data and Combined Effectiveness and Potency.

_contextSnippet: we show that these cells are particularly sensitive to PD-0325901 (mirdametinib) and trametinib, and to a lesser extent, selumetinib
details: Particularly sensitive to PD-0325901 (mirdametinib) and trametinib, and to a lesser extent, selumetinib
